name: r1-dispatch-mixed
description: R1 diagnostic candidate: dispatch (combine=route) with a mixed anthropic+codex roster. A gpt-5.4-mini coordinator reads each task and hands it to exactly one answerer. Not an acceptance run; measures dispatch quality, distribution, latency, and cross-provider viability.

modelMixing.guidance: Route hard multi-step reasoning, math, and tricky logic to anthropic/claude-opus-4-8. Route coding, code review, and structured analysis to codex/gpt-5.5. Route short factual, formatting, or protocol tasks to codex/gpt-5.4-mini. Never route reasoning, math, or multi-step logic to codex/gpt-5.4-mini; when uncertain between reasoning and a simple task, choose codex/gpt-5.5 or anthropic/claude-opus-4-8, never the mini model.

agents.notes: strong general coder and analyst; safe default when unsure
deep multi-step reasoning, math, and tricky logic
fast and cheap for short, simple, or mechanical tasks
